assertions.text: The vehicle pulled away (started moving) before accelerating for about ten seconds.
The driver accelerated for about ten seconds up to roughly 45 km/h.
A single impact occurred (exactly one collision).
The heavy impact occurred after the acceleration period.
After the collision the vehicle slowed and rolled to a near stop.

verdicts.evidence: The GPS shows the vehicle was stationary at [0.0 km/h at t=0.0 s](T3) and then non-zero speeds thereafter, e.g. [5.0 km/h at t=2.0 s and 13.0 km/h at t=3.0 s](T3), indicating it pulled away and began moving before the crash.

GPS speed rises from [0.0 km/h at t=0.0 s] to [45.0 km/h at t=10.0 s] with intermediate increases (e.g. [42.0 km/h at t=9.0 s] and [47.0 km/h at t=11.0 s]) consistent with about [10 seconds] of acceleration up to roughly [45 km/h] (max recorded [47.0 km/h])(T3)(T2).

IMU detect_events shows a single dominant impact spike on accel_x at [peak_t=11.01 s with magnitude 5.86 g] and one on accel_y at [peak_t=11.01 s magnitude 2.67 g] occurring simultaneously, indicating a single collision event rather than multiple separate impacts (T4)(T2).

The impact meets the system's high-magnitude criterion with a peak accel_x deviation of [5.862 g at t=11.01 s] and accel_y deviation of [2.665 g at t=11.01 s], which are above the impact threshold and consistent with a heavy impact (T2)(T4).
The GPS speed shows acceleration up to [45.0 km/h at t=10.0 s] followed by the impact detected at [11.01 s], so the heavy impact occurred after the acceleration period (T3)(T4).

After the impact at [11.01 s], GPS speed falls from about [47.0 km/h at t=11.0 s] to [22.0 km/h at t=13.0 s] and continues to [2.0 km/h at t=16.0 s], indicating the vehicle slowed and rolled to a near stop (T3)(T4).

result.rationale: Telemetry shows a takeoff from rest, ~10 s acceleration to ~45 km/h, a single high-magnitude impact at ~11.01 s, and a multi-second speed drop to near zero; all narrative assertions are supported by GPS and IMU evidence.

citations.claim: 5.0 km/h at t=2.0 s and 13.0 km/h at t=3.0 s

result.notes: 100 Hz IMU over a 16 s window. Units: accel g, gyro deg/s, speed km/h. Device-to-vehicle axis alignment is NOT documented; do not assume which axis is longitudinal without cross-checking against GPS speed.

accel_x.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

accel_y.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

accel_z.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

result.downsampling: per-bucket sample with the largest |deviation from channel median| is kept

detections.note: direction ambiguous: device axis orientation undocumented

result.thresholds_doc: impact spike: |a-baseline|>2.5g (>=20ms, merged<0.25s); sustained: 0.5s-avg in 0.35-1.2g; rotation: >40.0deg/s for 0.3s; net rotation >60.0deg; speed drop: >=15.0km/h in <=3.0s; brake: 0->1 transitions; CISS impact: max |crash-pulse delta-V|
